title: Expression and Purification of GST-Tagged ATG8 Proteins in E. coli
author: Elisabeth Holzer

steps.title: Inoculate E
steps.instruction: Inoculate E. coli Rosetta™ (DE3) pLysS cells harboring the plasmid into 2× TY medium and incubate at 37 °C with shaking.

steps.title: Monitor the culture's OD₆₀₀
steps.instruction: Monitor the culture's OD₆₀₀. Once it reaches approximately 0.4, reduce the temperature to 18 °C .

steps.title: Continue incubation until the OD₆₀₀ reaches ~0
steps.instruction: Continue incubation until the OD₆₀₀ reaches ~0.8.

steps.title: Induce protein expression by adding IPTG...
steps.instruction: Induce protein expression by adding IPTG to a final concentration of 100 micromolar (µM) .

steps.title: Incubate the culture at 18 °C for 16:00:00 with shaking
steps.instruction: Incubate the culture at 18 °C for 16:00:00 with shaking.

steps.title: Harvest cells by centrifugation at 4000...
steps.instruction: Harvest cells by centrifugation at 4000 x g, °C, for 00:20:00 at 4 °C .

steps.title: Wash the pellet once with ice-cold...
steps.instruction: Wash the pellet once with ice-cold 1× PBS (optional), then flash-freeze in liquid nitrogen and store at -80 °C until purification.

steps.title: Resuspend cell pellets in ice-cold lysis buffer
steps.instruction: Resuspend cell pellets in ice-cold lysis buffer.

steps.title: Lyse cells by sonication On ice (2× 30 sec, 60%)
steps.instruction: Lyse cells by sonication On ice (2× 30 sec, 60%).

steps.title: Centrifuge lysates at 18000 rpm, °C,...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge lysates at 18000 rpm, °C, (∼38,000 × g) for 00:45:00 at 4 °C in a Sorvall RC6+ centrifuge (F21S-8x50Y rotor).

steps.title: Collect the supernatant (cleared lysate)
steps.instruction: Collect the supernatant (cleared lysate).

steps.title: Equilibrate Glutathione Sepharose 4B beads in standard wash buffer
steps.instruction: Equilibrate Glutathione Sepharose 4B beads in standard wash buffer.

steps.title: Incubate cleared lysate with the beads...
steps.instruction: Incubate cleared lysate with the beads for 02:00:00 at 4 °C on a rotating wheel.

steps.title: Wash beads
steps.instruction: Wash beads: Twice with standard wash buffer Once with high-salt wash buffer Twice again with standard wash buffer

steps.title: Elute bound proteins using elution buffer...
steps.instruction: Elute bound proteins using elution buffer ( 50 millimolar (mM) reduced glutathione in standard wash buffer) or incubate with TEV protease in standard wash buffer overnight at 4 °C .

steps.title: Remove beads by centrifugation and filter...
steps.instruction: Remove beads by centrifugation and filter the supernatant through a 0.45 µm filter.

steps.title: Concentrate the eluted protein using 10 kDa Amicon centrifugal filters
steps.instruction: Concentrate the eluted protein using 10 kDa Amicon centrifugal filters.

steps.title: Load onto a Superdex 200 Increase...
steps.instruction: Load onto a Superdex 200 Increase 10/300 GL column equilibrated in SEC buffer.

steps.title: Collect fractions and analyze by SDS-PAGE
steps.instruction: Collect fractions and analyze by SDS-PAGE.

steps.title: Pool protein-containing fractions
steps.instruction: Pool protein-containing fractions.

steps.title: Concentrate the pooled protein, aliquot, snap-freeze...
steps.instruction: Concentrate the pooled protein, aliquot, snap-freeze in liquid nitrogen, and store at -80 °C .
